title: geranium beaufortianum
intro: Geranium beaufortianum, also known as the Transvaal geranium or Beaufort's geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Geranium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Geranium beaufortianum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Geranium beaufortianum include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
